free proxy via 5-day squared returns
Fit log(RV) ~ H·log(lag) → H ≈ 0.10, ν ≈ 0.30
H, ν, S₀, K, T, r (constexpr; no runtime I/O)
NumPy circulant-FFT engine (matches C++ FFTW convention)
Runs all three price_timed() across N ∈ {252, 500, 1000}, M = 10 000 paths
→ time_vs_N.png → construction_breakdown.png → memory_vs_N.png, error_vs_rank.png
→ structure_analysis.png Toeplitz heatmaps + off-diagonal SVD decay
→ sensitivity_surface.png → sensitivity_strike.png
→ validate_iv.png RFSV IV smile vs live SPY chains
→ validate_asian.png Lévy benchmark + roughness premium
→ convergence.png price ±1σ vs M paths, confirm σ ∝ 1/√M
→ stability_report.png FFT clipping, rSVD κ(Lₖ), Cholesky κ(C)
→ memory_profile.png tracemalloc peak vs N and M
Build N×N matrix C from fBM kernel (analytic)
src/cholesky/cholesky.hpp setup : C = LLᵀ — O(N³) per path: Lz — O(N²)
src/fft/fft.hpp setup : FFT(γ) → λ — O(N log N) per path: IFFT(√λ·w) — O(N log N)
src/hmatrix/hmatrix.hpp setup : rSVD → Lₖ — O(Nk²) per path: Lₖz — O(Nk)
wall time, construction + MC split peak RSS, bandwidth estimate
Frobenius ‖C−Cₖ‖_F/‖C‖_F price error vs p_ref
p_ref = 23.58 avg of 500k-path Chol + 500k-path FFT
